title: Set up seed?
description: Handoff ZIP applied{{label}}. Activate seed from boss via QR or manual entry.
scanInvalidSchema: Not a seed QR (schema ms) — enter mnemonic manually or scan boss QR again.
scanSuccess: Seed from QR applied — activate below.
pastePrompt: Paste QR text (from boss screen or photo OCR):
savedProfileHint: Enter app password below and unlock — or scan new seed from boss.

errors.savedPasswordMin: Saved profile: enter app password (8+ characters).
errors.mnemonicRequired: Mnemonic (12+ words), Bech32 secret or 64 hex required.
errors.optionalPasswordMin: Optional app password: at least 8 characters or leave empty.
